images.description: Balance / life balance concept image
Genius workspace mid-thought — chalkboard equations, organic paper chaos. B&W strips distraction, leaves structure and chaos coexisting.
images.channel_load: Productive chaos. Physical residue of a mind moving faster than filing.

images.description: Scientist leaned into microscope with whole body. Lab alive with others. Blue gloves, white coats, glassware. The posture of discovery.
images.channel_load: Visualized scientific observation. Commitment to seeing what's invisible.

images.description: Two people driving convertible into sunset above clouds. Arms up. Not arriving — going. Freedom as physical sensation.
images.channel_load: Forward motion with trust. Joy of trajectory over destination.

images.description: Empty chemistry lab, clean and waiting. Oak benches, glass cabinets. The space between experiments.
images.channel_load: Potential energy. The moment before work begins.

images.description: Cell biology explainer image
Dense lattice graph — diamond-shaped, multi-colored edges tangling across layers. Complexity too ordered for dismissal.
images.channel_load: Structured complexity. Relationships too dense for intuition.

images.description: Fibonacci succulent spiraling green to gold. Self-similarity at every scale. Nature doing math.

images.description: Galaxy spiraling into center, gold and teal. Arms trailing — the record of where it's been. Shannon's Mouse: arms ARE the memory.
images.channel_load: Temporal memory encoded in structure.

images.description: Discrete optimization polytopes orbiting text. Each solid shows interior wireframe visible only once boundary defined.
images.channel_load: Progressive constraint revelation.

images.description: Graph visualization — likely mathematical, the number 42
Conway's Game of Life — six configurations walking trajectories: Stable, Death, Repeat. Same rules, different fates.
images.channel_load: Trajectory fate. The stress test in visual form.

images.description: Cell interior at molecular resolution. Thousands of molecules doing independent jobs with no coordinator. Composition through precision.
images.channel_load: Drive 6 (Mesh) made visible. The cell as methodology metaphor.

images.description: Festival performer mid-leap, drumsticks raised, facing ocean of humanity. One person commanding hundreds of thousands.
images.channel_load: Attention architecture at maximum scale.

images.description: Puppy peeking from mustard knitted blanket. Eyes in highest-attention zone. Knitting: zero derivative, accumulated warmth.
images.channel_load: The stopping criterion. Another pass would add noise.

images.description: Older couple embracing outdoors, both laughing, autumn park. Grey hair, unplanned matching blue tones. Joy compounded.

A grocery store aisle. Every inch is DDE Stage 4 at industrial scale. The most sophisticated attention architecture most people encounter daily, invisible because it works.
